description: NS4168 I2S Class D audio amp, +5V, AMP_EN GPIO shutdown, R20 100K pull-down, datasheet bypass caps

changelog.notes: Verified in KiCad. Fixed C17 cap pin offset (3.81mm not 5.08mm). Changed CTRL from pull-up to AMP_EN GPIO + R20 pull-down for pop-free startup. User opened schematic, KiCad re-annotated and repositioned R20. Saved.
